name: compliance: rule may include controls:[{framework, id, title, url}] mapping it to compliance frameworks
setup:
printf 'id: no-eval
name: no-eval
description: x
detector: x
type: problem
fixable: null
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: null
docs_url: https://example.com/no-eval
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: error
version: 1
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: stable
provenance: bundled
controls:
  - framework: PCI-DSS
    id: 6.5.1
    title: Injection flaws
    url: https://pcisec/6.5.1
' > rule.yaml
